title: Full Project Catalogue
public_claim: This catalogue brings the deeper nikmurano.com project pages into this standalone professional package as in-page project sections.
distinctive_mechanism: The page works by linking visible components, source roles, and next-step gates. The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.
use_value: It shows the utility of Full Project Catalogue by tying the project purpose to the mechanism that makes it inspectable, reusable, or professionally valuable.

minimum_public_demo: Test one representative case; confirm input (packet name, source files, version signal, scope...) produces output (what the packet is and what decision it can still...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
